def negative_repeated_casefold_or_lower_calls_before_multiple_comparisons():
    rule_id = "repeated_casefold_or_lower_calls_before_multiple_comparisons"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that normalizes the same candidate repeatedly before several comparisons."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
